title: Design System from Biings
content: Design System from Directories: Components: Biings Design System is a streamlined and comprehensive design framework created to establish uniform and coherent user experiences across Biings HR products. Design System emphasizes component documentation through live examples and guidelines with a focus on consistency, efficiency, and user-centricity. Color System Icons Layout Typography Voice and Tone Alert banner Avatar Button Checkbox Data table Dropdown Form Link Menus Modal Progress indicator Radio button Segmented control Snackbar Tabs Tag Text field Tooltip
